heading: Extension of classification facilities to cotton growers
label: 51a Extension of classification facilities to cotton growers
text: The Secretary of Agriculture is requested to extend to cotton growers facilities for the classification of cotton authorized in this chapter, with such supervision of licensed classifiers as he shall deem necessary under authority of the United States Cotton Futures Act.
notes: References in TextThe United States Cotton Futures Act, referred to in text, is part A of , , which was repealed by section 4 of , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code prior to its repeal, see Tables.act Aug. 11, 1916, ch. 31339 Stat. 476act Feb. 10, 1939, ch. 253 Stat. 1
CodificationThis section was not enacted as part of the United States Cotton Standards Act which comprises this chapter.
